message:
fix: Fix use-after-free bug in SQL statement execution

Root cause: SQL string slices in AST pointed to JavaScript-owned memory.
When JS released the string, AST contained dangling pointers causing
"column not found" errors when executing multiple statements.

Changes:
- Copy SQL string in lance_sql_parse() so AST slices remain valid
- Store sql_copy in Statement struct, free in lance_sql_close()
- Add Statement.finalize() method for explicit resource cleanup

Also fixes:
- Database.readonly now defaults to true for Lance files
- Added FinalizeStmt method to C++ binding
